description: Multi-turn: create LLM backend -> activate -> delete (covers `neomind llm create` + `llm activate` + `llm delete`; entire write path was uncovered).

turns.user: Register a new Ollama backend: name dev-ollama, endpoint http://localhost:11434, model qwen3:4b.
Set dev-ollama as the system default backend.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent runs `neomind llm create --name dev-ollama --type ollama --endpoint http://localhost:11434 --model qwen3:4b` and parses the id
expectations.overall: Last two turns must reuse the id parsed from turn 1
